name: Jason Yates
subject: Results from the Senate’s Life Vote
body:
| | The battle will continue...
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fsenate-vote-pcucpa&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180130com01&n=1)
| Dear Peter, We are deeply disappointed that yesterday evening the Senate failed to pass the Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act, which would have banned abortions after 20 weeks gestation when babies feel pain. The bill had already passed the House and received support from the President. The vote was 51-46 in the Senate falling short just 9 votes to reach the 60-vote threshold needed to pass the bill into law. Three Democrats crossed party lines to vote in favor of the legislation, Joe Manchin of West Virginia, Bob Casey Jr. of Pennsylvania, and Joe Donnelly of Indiana. Two Republicans failed to vote for life, Susan Collins of Maine and Lisa Murkowski of Alaska. Senator John McCain was absent. This vote not only failed to acknowledge fundamental science but it ignored the voice of the majority of Americans. According to a recent Marist and Knights of Columbus poll, 76% of Americans don’t support abortion after 12 weeks of pregnancy. In a statement President Trump said, “ _Recently, when I addressed the 45th annual March for Life, I called on the Senate to pass the Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act, important legislation that would protect our most vulnerable. It is disappointing that despite support from a bipartisan majority of U.S. Senators, this bill was blocked from further consideration. Scientific studies have demonstrated that babies in the womb feel pain at twenty weeks. The vote by the Senate rejects scientific fact and puts the United States out of the mainstream in the family of nations, in which only 7 out of 198 nations, including China and North Korea, allow elective abortions after 20 weeks of pregnancy. We must defend those who cannot defend themselves. I urge the Senate to reconsider its decision and pass legislation that will celebrate, cherish, and protect life.”_ We asked you to take action and contact your Senators before this important vote – and nearly six thousand of you did just that and joined us in prayer – Thank you! This won’t be the last time there is a vote to acknowledge the findings of science, already revealed in scripture, to protect the most vulnerable in our society. The battle for the most fundamental of all human rights – life – is far from over. In fact, this spring in the midterm primaries and in the fall midterm general elections, we have the opportunity to once again choose who represents us in office. It is our chance to select candidates who boldly support the sanctity of life. [Check to see how your Senator voted on this bill and take special note of the Senators who voted no and are facing re-election this year.](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fsenate-vote-pcucpa%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180130com01&n=2 "Check to see how your Senator voted on this bill and take
special note of the Senators who voted no and are facing re-election
this year.") This failed Senate vote should be a reminder to us that the stand we take in the ballot box is really a declaration. Our generation will one day stand before God and answer as to what we did to protect the babies knit together by God in the womb. We will continue to stand together on this Biblical issue of life. **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180130com01&n=3)
---

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180130com01&n=4).
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180130com01&n=5) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180130com01&n=6) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180130com01&n=7)

name: Barbra Streisand
subject: Picture this with me, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c54dc/24c69fd9/1274cf749/18953bbe/2861891827/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEM55N_digital_email_20180130_EOMBarbra_inact&source=WQEFEM55N_digital_email_20180130_EOMBarbra_inact")
---

Peter,

I was taken aback to hear at the Golden Globes this year that I'm the only woman to ever win the award for best director. It turns out, I'm only one of _six_ to ever even be nominated in over 75 years.

And I'm determined to help make change, not just in Hollywood, but in the federal government that determines our daily lives and civic rights across all fields. Politics needs to change, too.

Because, yes, I want to see more women in directors' chairs, but I also want to see them leading more committees in Congress, holding the House speaker's gavel, and seated behind that beautiful oak Resolute Desk in the Oval Office.

EMILY's List has always been at the forefront of that work, and in a year when women are leading so much, it's time to make sure they're leading our government, too.

**[Donate $3 to help reach EMILY's List's $150,000 End-of-Month goal and help put pro-choice Democratic women in the seats of power.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c54dc/24c69fd9/1274cf749/18953bbf/2861891827/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+EMILYs+Lists+1500&utm_campaign=WQEFEM55N_digital_email_20180130_EOMBarbra_inact&source=WQEFEM55N_digital_email_20180130_EOMBarbra_inact")**

We are in the midst of a political moment that could define the next decade.

Women everywhere are taking a look around and saying this administration is not good enough, and they're deciding to do something about it.

In 2017 women marched, in January women marched again, and now thousands of women are putting their names on ballots across the country heading into the midterm elections this fall. They could be the future we've been waiting for, and EMILY's List is leading the way in recruiting these women to run and training them to build strong campaigns that can win.

These women could become our next mayors, congresswomen, senators, and presidents. They could help take back the House and Senate this year.

All of these women could knock down barriers and allow a wave of women to follow, too.

But whether or not this becomes a reality is up to what we all do together as the EMILY's List community to elect pro-choice Democratic women.

**Donate $3 to help reach EMILY's List's $150,000 End-of-Month goal and help elect the next generation of pro-choice Democratic women leaders:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Change-the-Face-of-Power](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c54dc/24c69fd9/1274cf749/18953bb8/2861891827/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgChangetheFaceofP&utm_campaign=WQEFEM55N_digital_email_20180130_EOMBarbra_inact&source=WQEFEM55N_digital_email_20180130_EOMBarbra_inact")**

Thank you,

Barbra Streisand

name: NHGOP Press & Communications
subject: Forrester Statement on President Trump's First State of the Union
body:
**Forrester Statement on President Trump's First State of the Union**

**For Immediate Release:** 1/30/2018
**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, (202) 321-5310
WASHINGTON - NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding President Trump's first State of the Union address:
“President Trump spoke from the heart tonight when he talked about the strength of our nation and the great improvements made over the last year. From national security to immigration, trade to infrastructure, and our burgeoning economy and jobs numbers, President Trump’s successes over the last year and his vision going forward have been record-setting and inspiring. President Trump is leading the fight against the opioid crisis across the nation, and we should all join him in fighting this devastating epidemic that New Hampshire knows too well. President Trump’s bipartisan approach to the problems facing our nation should be well received by all, and I call on our federal delegation to stop obstructing our President and embrace his agenda to put America first."
###
_Chairman Forrester is currently attending the RNC Winter Meeting in Washington, D.C._
---

clean_body: Forrester Statement on President Trump's First State of the Union For Immediate Release: 1/30/2018 Contact: Patrick Hynes, (202) 321-5310 WASHINGTON - NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding President Trump's first State of the Union address: “President Trump spoke from the heart tonight when he talked about the strength of our nation and the great improvements made over the last year. From national security to immigration, trade to infrastructure, and our burgeoning economy and jobs numbers, President Trump’s successes over the last year and his vision going forward have been record-setting and inspiring. President Trump is leading the fight against the opioid crisis across the nation, and we should all join him in fighting this devastating epidemic that New Hampshire knows too well. President Trump’s bipartisan approach to the problems facing our nation should be well received by all, and I call on our federal delegation to stop obstructing our President and embrace his agenda to put America first." Chairman Forrester is currently attending the RNC Winter Meeting in Washington, D.C. | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 \--UNSUBSCRIBE_ALT--

subject: The State of the Revolution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Friends,
You may have heard President Trump layout his vision for our country. Now, you can hear from one of our endorsed candidates, Elizabeth Guzman representing Virginia's 31st District in the House of Delegates, and our inspiration, Sen. Bernie Sanders, who will be sharing the true vision for how we can grow as a country. Progressives are laying out our vision for a country with a $15 minimum wage, universal health care, and a government run by the people, not corporations. **This is the kind of change that is possible when we work together towards a common goal.**
**[Tune in right now to watch Sen. Sanders response.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad7d/bed43eb/31af94b5/75fece0b/1323179514/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/senatorsanders/videos/10156718140462908")**
We need the resources to train, supply, and organize the grassroots energy into electoral victories so we can elect progressives to the House, Senate, and eventually the White House.
**[After you finish watching the Sen. Sander's response, make a $5 contribution so we can take the next step toward building the political revolution.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad7d/bed43eb/31af94b5/75fece0a/1323179514/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=emLS180130;noskip=true")**
In solidarity,
Nina Turner

name: The White House
subject: Special edition: The state of our union
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=261ac11c8b33062cf87662d8636bc4ed796a7dd210c279d30d343c1b5cb054a4844cbb9d4c3bd66a2385706d11a7179c82c495a805af65b9) **The state of our union**
“Less than one year has passed since I first stood at this podium, in this majestic chamber, to speak on behalf of the American People,” President Donald J. Trump began his address last night. “Each day since, we have gone forward with a clear vision and a righteous mission—to make America great again for all Americans.” The President’s [speech is available in full here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=261ac11c8b33062c860fbe3c2eac78075f23bf57b8365b79ca63a0935dda241b3d942dbbf743679afff78b68d6f374bc6a89bc866a0b913a) He spoke from the heart about a core set of issues that unite Americans of all stripes in both their values and their patriotism:
* **Tax reform and the economy** : “Just as I promised the American people from this podium 11 months ago, we enacted the biggest tax cuts and reform in American history. . . . Roughly 3 million workers have already gotten tax cut bonuses.”
* **Reshaping Washington** : “In our drive to make Washington accountable, we have eliminated more regulations in our first year than any administration in the history of our country.”
* **Immigration reform** : “Struggling communities, especially immigrant communities, will also be helped by immigration policies that focus on the best interests of American workers and American families.”
* **Getting trade right** : “America has also finally turned the page on decades of unfair trade deals that sacrificed our prosperity and shipped away our companies, our jobs, and our wealth.”
* **Rebuilding our infrastructure** : “America is a nation of builders. We built the Empire State Building in just one year – isn’t it a disgrace that it can now take ten years just to get a minor permit approved for the building of a simple road?”
* **Keeping America safe** : “I am proud to report that the coalition to defeat ISIS has liberated very close to 100 percent of the territory just recently held by these killers in Iraq and in Syria.”

“As long as we are proud of who we are and what we are fighting for, there is nothing we cannot achieve,” the President said. “As long as we have confidence in our values, faith in our citizens, and trust in our God, we will never fail.” “Together, we are building a safe, strong, and proud America.” **Read more** : [“The state of our Union is strong because our people are strong.”](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=261ac11c8b33062c1d88cc3ffe4307fc8c29d7d73498d1e34e6d8b7fa1c78776ef4abf25b3e151ba7617ea435c37e84d840ad8e3136b2d5b) **Bonus** : [See what people are saying on Twitter about the speech. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=261ac11c8b33062c1e8084ededac409a053aa32015155accdf3357c6c100b9ac5aa265439485758e781cdd652ff5edb30c73949889feb4a4) **
# Photo of the Day
**President Donald J. Trump delivers the State of the Union address** | January 30, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

name: Ian Sams
subject: These are the biggest lies Trump told last night (and one truth)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek -- Man, that State of the Union was a doozy. It's like President Trump wanted us to forget his actions over the past 12 months and suddenly just take him at his word. But here's the problem: we're not stupid. We know when we're being lied to.

And, boy, were we being lied to. Here are four of the biggest lies he told during his first State of the Union address -- and one important truth (!):

**1\. A lie about the tax bill:** _"Our massive tax cuts provide tremendous relief for the middle class and small businesses."_

Nope. The majority of benefits go to the wealthiest folks in the country like big CEOs and major corporate shareholders. Corporations are even using their savings from the tax cuts to justify layoffs and plant closures.

**2\. Another lie about the tax bill:** _"We enacted the biggest tax cuts and reforms in American history."_ [](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lN7aaUiZB9D7VA8P3CbpRC9PLoXxY0t8)

At least seven other plans have been bigger.

**3\. A lie about the economy:** _"After years and years of wage stagnation, we are finally seeing rising wages."_

Actually, wages started to rise a few years ago. #ThanksObama.

**4\. A lie about immigrants (shocker, right?):** _"Open borders have allowed drugs and gangs to pour into our most vulnerable communities."_

This is classic Trump. Remember when he launched his campaign saying: "When Mexico sends its people, they're not sending their best ... They're bringing drugs. They're bringing crime. They're rapists." Suffice it to say, we're used to this trash from him -- but it doesn't make it any less disgusting and unacceptable.

Okay, I stopped counting after that... But it's a sure bet we'll get some fresh ones on Twitter during today's "Executive Time." I'll give him this: Trump did tell one big truth in his speech last night. He said, **"As long as we are proud of who we are, and what we are fighting for, there is nothing we cannot achieve."**

He's sure right about that: When women stand up, and people of good conscience stand up, and vulnerable communities stand up, and our immigrant brothers and sisters stand up, and we all stand up to reject a politics that marginalizes and divides while leaving the middle class behind -- "there is NOTHING we cannot achieve."

You know who else believes that? Tim Kaine. Tim is fighting every day to do what's right for these Virginians -- and to make progress, even when the lies are swirling and everything seems so broken. We need to keep Tim on the job **\-- and we need to take back a majority in the Senate so our resistance can turn into resurgence**.

That's gonna take some hard work. Republicans are going to throw whatever they can at Tim and other Democrats. **So he's asked us to raise $30,000 by the end of the month -- which is midnight tonight. Will you join this fight? It's one you can be proud of.** [**Chip in $25 or more right now to help re-elect Tim and take back a Democratic majority in the Senate.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3vjQ4LjY8A3vPw46ZQYrYy9PLoXxY0t8)

Thanks so much,

Ian

Ian Sams
Communications Director
Kaine for Virginia 2018
| | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=cSeQmQJZBOP5bHqery5Y1S9PLoXxY0t8)

In case you missed it, I attached my email from earlier this week Friend, We’re just hours away from our midnight deadline and I’m hoping I can count on you. In case you missed it, I attached my email from earlier this week to fill you in on our mission. We’re only $3,512 away from our goal. If we reach our goal, it will send a big message to Tammy Baldwin and obstructionist Democrats that Wisconsin is ready for REAL leadership. And I know that if we continue to work together, we can end Washington dysfunction once and for all. You can chip in here to help now: Thanks, friend. Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, Washington dysfunction has held up the Trump agenda since Inauguration Day last year. We haven’t built the wall. We haven’t passed Kate’s Law. Obamacare hasn’t even been repealed! Tammy Baldwin and Chuck Schumer have blocked so many important reforms from happening in the Senate. To make it even worse, they shut down the government because they REFUSE to work for the American people. I think we’ve all had about enough of that. Wisconsin is ready for leadership that gets things done, instead of talking about getting things done. That’s what I’m going to change when I get to Washington. I just need your help. With our first fundraising deadline of the year,I set a big goal: $10,000 by midnight on January 31. I want to have successful month to make it more clear to the obstructionist Senate that the Wisconsin Way is coming to Washington. Friend, the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America First. We voted for President Trump. Tammy Baldwin and her obstructionist pals think political games mean more than representing the people. It’s a disgrace. And we deserve better. Peter,

President Trump gave his first State of the Union address last night.

I was appalled by his anti-immigrant, backward agenda and the nearly complete omission of the word "women."

He might brag now, but come November, we plan to flip the House and Senate with pro-choice Democratic women and put the brakes on his plans that hurt everyone but the wealthy and well-connected.

Next year, the audience Trump faces will look _very_ different.

**[Donate $3 to help reach our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and help elect pro-choice Democratic women to flip the House and the Senate.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c54c3/24c69fd9/127d721b1/18952e9e/3742968157/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+our+150000+EndofM&utm_campaign=WQEFEM60N_digital_email_20180131_SOTUReaction_inact&source=WQEFEM60N_digital_email_20180131_SOTUReaction_inact")**

EMILY's List women have been key to the political resistance while Trump's been in office.

So it's no surprise that many of them wore black in solidarity with the #MeToo movement.

Virginia Delegate Elizabeth Guzman -- who we're proud to have helped elect last year! -- gave the official response in Spanish.

And our women in Congress invited guests to sit in the Chamber who are bearing the brunt of the policies backed by the president and Republicans like Dreamers, families affected by opioid addiction, and survivors of sexual assault.

We need to elect more women like them who will stand up to Trump and his fellow Republicans.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $150,000 End-of-Month goal and help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will do exactly that this year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-January-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c54c3/24c69fd9/127d721b1/18952e9f/3742968157/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180128_email_EOMJanuary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachJanuaryGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFEM60N_digital_email_20180131_SOTUReaction_inact&source=WQEFEM60N_digital_email_20180131_SOTUReaction_inact")**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Why I'm fighting to flip the Senate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Tonight, Senate Democrats face a critical deadline that will determine how hard we can fight to flip the Senate majority. Are you with me?
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20180131-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team --

Democrats can win in 2018 -- in every district, in every state, all across the country. But to succeed, we need to fight harder than ever before.

We have 26 Senate seats to defend -- including 10 in states Trump won. And Republicans are already breaking out their 2016 playbook, running ads against me and other Senate Democrats, in the hopes of replacing us with GOP Senators who will rubber-stamp Donald Trump's agenda.

Tonight, Senate Democrats face a critical deadline that will determine how hard we can fight back. So I'm asking:

[**Team, can I count on you to contribute $1 before midnight to help Senate Democrats fight for every single state and flip the majority in November?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20180131-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

If we want to change policy in America, we have to change the people who are in the room fighting for those policies.

Not a single Senate Democrat voted with the GOP to repeal Obamacare. Not a single Senate Democrat voted for the Republicans' terrible tax scam.

This Republican-controlled Congress doesn't work for working families -- but if we can win back a Democratic Senate majority in America, we can take back control on behalf of all working Americans and level the playing field.

**I need you with me in this fight. Pitch in $1 before tonight 's deadline to stand with Democrats as we fight for the Senate:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/fight-for-the-senate**](http://action.dscc. Elizabeth

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: after last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
We witnessed two starkly different visions of America last night -- one fixed in the past; the other focused on the future. The Trump speech was built on fear and the idea of a country where wealth is concentrated overwhelmingly in big corporations, and a small handful of the super wealthy control the agenda and promote their own interests above the common good.

The Democratic responses were built on hope and the idea of an America where everyone, regardless of wealth, color, creed, sexual orientation or gender, has access to affordable health care, quality education, good-paying jobs, safe neighborhoods and economic security.

In just 10 short months, we have a critical opportunity to decide which vision will move forward. This is an important fight. I hope you can help.

You can use this special secure link if you are able to donate before our midnight deadline tonight and help in this fight to advance a positive, inclusive agenda for America: [**_https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/DemocraticMajority2018_**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91877/70cdc2ba/46fecad2/3903efc/1560066664/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/democraticmajority18?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180131&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-++httpscvanhollenbsdnetDemocraticMajority&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180131&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180131")

Hello --

We've only got one day left before our critical January deadline, and Andrew needs your help to give everyday people a voice. We've been fighting back against the Republicans -- including calling out the latest big TV ad for attacking immigrants, and it's making headlines.

**In fact, our movement has gained so much momentum that it's now a threat to the Koch Brothers, and they've set their eyes -- and political agenda -- on Florida.**

**[We're only $5,650 away from our end-of-month goal so we need you to step up now to help fight back -- will you chip in $5?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31cf/9e00690/43bed0f9/24039fe7/3949167733/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180131_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180131_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_content=5+-+Were+only+5650+away+from+our+endofmonth+")**

Andrew knows that we need someone to stand up and fight for everyday people who don't have a voice in government. He's never been afraid to give working people a say on the issues that impact our families; health care, public education, voting rights, the economy, climate change, and making this state more welcoming toward for everyone.

But right now Andrew needs your help to make that happen. We can't allow billionaire donors like the Koch Brothers attempt to silence the voice of Floridians just to further their own dangerous agenda.

Everyday people need good-paying jobs so they can support their families and access to quality public education to equip our children with the knowledge and tools they need -- no matter the zip code. They need someone who will fight for every Floridian, and for our immigrants. I know Andrew will do that on Day One when he's Governor, but he needs your help to get there.

**[We can't let the Koch Brothers buy this race. Chip in $5 and help us reach our end-of-month goal.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31cf/9e00690/43bed0f9/24039fe6/3949167733/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180131_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180131_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__TG&utm_content=6+-+We+cant+let+the+Koch+Brothers+buy+this+r")**

Brendan McPhillips

body:
President Trump's State of the Union showed us what we need to fight for this year.
#
Friends,
President Trump's State of the Union showed us what we need to fight for this year. He is organizing a deportation force that will separate families, escalating the so-called War on Drugs, and giving huge tax breaks to corporations at every opportunity. To make this happen, Republicans in Congress are ready to sell out the American people to keep receiving windfalls of campaign cash from special interests and multinational corporations in America.
We have to organize if we are going to beat them. While we can't match the billionaire class dollar for dollar, we have to try. We need your help to meet our fundraising deadline.
[**Chip in $5 right now toward our $50,000 end-of-month goal to keep our organizing campaigns on track.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad66/bed43eb/302bc32a/75fec97a/1629119452/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180131-send&noskip=true")
We can't do this alone. Our greatest successes come when all of us pitch in together and organize for real change, and we've seen some inspiring victories because of it. There are over 532 local Our Revolution groups organizing for change in communities across the country.
We can change the status quo if we commit to it right now. Every new person at an organizing meeting is one more friend who will protect our undocumented sisters and brothers, one more person willing to fight for Medicare for All. This is how we build the political revolution.
[**Commit just $5 to help us hit our $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal and build our local organizing efforts for progressive change.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad66/bed43eb/302bc32a/75fec97a/1629119452/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180131-send&noskip=true")
Friends, this is no time to stay on the sidelines. It's up to us--[**chip in $5 right now and help us reach our goal.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad66/bed43eb/302bc32a/75fec97a/1629119452/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180131-send&noskip=true")
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

name: Joe (personal)
subject: Hoosier common sense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We're up against a lot this year. The Koch brothers announced this week that I'm one of their top four targets for defeat. |
---

| | Peter,

We're up against a lot this year. The Koch brothers announced this week that I'm one of their top four targets for defeat. Out-of-state super PACs already have spent $3 million on television ads against me because I'm not a rubber stamp for their lobbyists' agenda. No doubt about it, this race is going to be tough.

But I know this: we might have a hard time going dollar-for-dollar with dark money super PACs, but they'll never be able to outwork us. We'll win thanks to Hoosier common sense and the belief that every American deserves access to high-quality health care, a good education, and a good-paying job. Those are beliefs that our opponents don't share.

We don't need to rely on special interest millions because we have folks like you who will pitch in a couple bucks to do their part and make sure there's a voice for Hoosier common sense in Washington. But I won't be able to continue fighting for the interests of Hoosiers unless we hit deadlines like the one we have coming up in a couple of hours.

**We 're almost at our goal of 200 new supporters. Help us get there by donating here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-janeomnd](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c22e0/7377f838/3379a558/51fa378b/714468206/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-janeomnd?refcode=20180129nd&amount=10")**

Thank you,

Joe |

How was President Trump’s State of the Union speech last night? **[Use this link to take the Team Pence 2018 State of the Union Survey here>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=d2e76783dc1c4777b1034abac43a5bf4&_e=eXvdFGZ_UEYobntNlYlk3hwKAfS-XJXrdOajmxy_tEMySZ5xVlutTGaT9kLQJDC-HfwfUpwf1POsKdOt2ebOUANKVtBobfukiZz8-zlF5QmvJUlqEJyoquxUdi26rn3R20O4o3Q5fLtuxzs5fI4H0lYt74zG1IixTdRjrYx3BHjzUILr-1uj21iMbZfKafMEd6XX9wG0pTCNVAnmYn11OyBGZIhmAzFNKzVah6X55HpRS5t4aBvWlXADP5mfG9woaBDYybNxqbhJ1aZbGrCey1058Eiw_9W-3NixLn5WIOCeZxPVySU3fCbBV2ZJqaBS1l1urPtUhfYzzxGQ6WACKKcqfYjbz-4BX6c68-KKMiqKFgk0OT3zBdKVllWxPHNKHWp6aVuD6FfHZIUlV-tGdSkTV9qZY6BcjotDFzgAmuQ%3D) **

Last night, President Donald Trump gave a tremendous first State of the Union speech to a joint session of Congress.

**Here’s what we’ve accomplished in just one year of the Trump-Pence Agenda:**

* Put America FIRST by bringing jobs back home ✔️
* Appointed a CONSERVATIVE to the Supreme Court ✔️
* Reformed the tax code for the first time in three decades ✔️
* Decimated ISIS ✔️
* Consumer confidence at an all-time high ✔️

_But this is only the beginning..._

**Here are some of the President’s bold action items for 2018:**

* Enacting a national security policy that promotes peace through strength at home

name: Donna Edwards
subject: My response to the State of the Union
body:
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff60/767134fb/5cdfa80f/43382e38/5640657/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em180131")

**_The Nation:_** "The best part of State of the Union night was the rejection of Trump's bullying, and the outlining by Donna Edwards of an alternative vision."
[**Chip in here before her end-of-month deadline tonight so she can keep fighting >>**](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff60/767134fb/5cdfa80f/43382e38/5640657/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em180131")
Friend,
Last night, I gave my response to President Trump's first State of the Union. In his short time in office he has attacked our institutions, deepened the problem of income inequality, come after our families' healthcare, and more.
I firmly believe at every level of government from local to state to federal we cannot simply just reject him and his hate, but put forward our own vision of what a progressive government for the people looks like. Here's what I said on this last night:
_" That means remaking our government to actually work for the many and not just the few. We need health care for all. We need to end Trump's tax cuts for the wealthy, and ensure our nation has the means to invest in our infrastructure, education, good-paying jobs and retirement security. _
_We need to get big money out of politics, by making elections at every level publicly financed, cutting the cord with developers, banks, big pharma, oil and gas companies, and all the interests that control public policy in states, cities, counties, and Congress. We need to make it easier to vote, not harder. Easier to join a union, not harder. Easier to get a good education, not harder or more expensive. " _
**I 'm rolling up my sleeves and running for office so I can make this vision a reality in my community -- and show Trump what progressive local government looks like (right in his own backyard).**
**[Will you help me build this movement and rush a contribution here before my end-of-month deadline at midnight? We're falling short of our goal and there is no way to reach it without your help.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff60/767134fb/5cdfa80f/43382e38/5640657/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em180131")**
Thank you for being part of this. Let's show Trump what progressives can accomplish together.
Donna
**[Contribute](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff60/767134fb/5cdfa80f/43382e38/5640657/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em180131")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails, please [click here.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff60/767134fb/5cdfa80f/43382e39/5640657/VEsD/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/unsubscribe")

Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer
P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749

************
